name: RDS automated backups disabled
description: RDS automated backup retention period is set to 0 days, effectively disabling backups. This prevents point-in-time recovery in the event of data loss, corruption, or ransomware.
remediation: Set BackupRetentionPeriod to at least 7 days. For compliance-sensitive workloads, use 35 days (the maximum). Combine with AWS Backup for cross-region backup copies.
